name: agramlabs-starter
description: Gutenberg-first WordPress starter theme with Bootstrap grid, SCSS, BEM, and optimized assets.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build:css: sass --load-path=node_modules src/scss/main.scss assets/css/main.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && postcss assets/css/main.css -o assets/css/main.css && sass --load-path=node_modules src/scss/editor.scss assets/css/editor.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && postcss assets/css/editor.css -o assets/css/editor.css
